positive: A whimsical illustration of a forest spirit curled up among glowing bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate ferns. Studio Ghibli aesthetic, highly detailed line work, vibrant pastel color palette, storybook illustration style, volumetric lighting, digital painting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, grainy, photorealistic
